---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a change to the spec, an SDK, the CLI, or the bench.
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem
<!-- What friction or gap are you hitting? One or two sentences. -->

## Proposed shape
<!-- The API, field, CLI flag, or spec edit you have in mind. Keep it concrete. -->

## Alternatives considered
<!-- What else did you try or think about? Why is this one better? -->

## Scope
<!-- Which surface does this touch: spec, visit SDK, provider helper, CLI,
     mcp-adapter, bench, reference, web? Cross off the rest. -->

## Out of scope
<!-- Anything this explicitly does NOT cover. Keeps the change reviewable. -->
